creator: shaun@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: shaun->simon

02:19 <@Mavvie> go for it! 
02:19 <@Mavvie> it's commit time! 
02:22 <@Cydex> Mavvie: we need a doc person 
02:22 <@Cydex> Chimera is absent :-( 
02:23 <@Mavvie> Assign the PR to him, stating that you approved it. 
02:24 <@Mavvie> that's the best way to go I think. 
02:24 <@Mavvie> workflows workflows workflows... 

Feel free to bounce this back to me if you don't have time to look at 
it.
